lang.skins_disclaimer: Skins and pets only work in Freeplay mode.
lang.AWARDBIO_all_four: Beat Monotone Attack as each character once.
lang.AWARDBIO_double_trouble: Use a skin in Identity Crisis.
lang.AWARDBIO_lets_be_friends: Fight Grey in Pretender as Playable Pink.
lang.AWARDHINT_revenge: Give your killer a piece of your mind.
lang.AWARDHINT_you_suck: Have you tried not hitting any notes?
lang.AWARDBIO_tuesday_morning: Play Tomongus Tuesday on a Tuesday.
lang.AWARDHINT_tuesday_morning: Is it that day of the week yet?
lang.AWARDBIO_red_handed: Play as Red, against Red, with a Red pet.
lang.AWARDBIO_five_s_ranks: Earn an S rank or higher on 5 different songs.
lang.AWARDBIO_first_p: Earn a P rank on any song.
lang.AWARDBIO_cosmi_collector: Reach 100% completion on the VS Impostor Cosmicube.
lang.AWARDBIO_no_miss_finale: Beat Finale without missing a single note.
lang.AWARDBIO_im_hungry: Bring the Mini Crewmate to the Chef's kitchen.
lang.AWARDHINT_im_hungry: I think your mini crewmate is hungry...
lang.AWARDBIO_the_hundred: Earn every award, unlock every skin and pet, and beat every song.

lang.dialogue_heartbeat4: oh um he wasnt talking to you

lang.doubletrouble0: You can now play Double Trouble.
lang.doubletrouble1: (In the Freeplay menu! Under bonus songs!)
lang.opt_downscroll_desc:
Enables downscroll.
 (Notes come from the top instead of bottom.)
lang.opt_middlescroll_desc:
Enables middlescroll.
 (Centers the player's notes and hides the opponent's.)
lang.opt_ghosttapping_desc:
Enables Ghost Tapping.
(Pressing keys when no notes are present won't count as misses.)
lang.opt_sustainsasonenote_desc:
Hold notes will be dropped if let go too early and only count as one miss.
Disable for the old input.
lang.opt_laneunderlay_desc: Adds a semi-transparent background behind the notes.
lang.opt_laneUnderlayStyle_desc: Changes the appearance or layering of the lane underlay(s).
lang.opt_opponentLaneUnderlay_desc: Shows the lane underlay behind the opponent's notes.
lang.opt_hitsoundvolume_desc: Adds a hitsound for every note hit.
lang.opt_lowquality_desc:
Disables some background details,
decreases loading times and improves performance.
lang.opt_debugdisplaytype_desc:
Handles what type of information to display in the top left of your screen.
Simple displays FPS & Memory, and advanced displays the same alongside debug information.
Disabled disables the counter entirely.
lang.opt_framerate_desc: Changes the maximum framerate of the game.
lang.opt_timebar_desc: What should the Time Bar display?
lang.opt_hudrankdisplay_desc: What should be displayed on the HUD?
lang.opt_coloredui_desc:
Colors UI elements based on the opponent's icon color.
(Some colors might be hard to read.)
lang.opt_photosensitivemode_desc:
Tones down screen flashes and other visual effects (such as quickly moving backgrounds).
Enable this if you're prone to photosensitive epilepsy.
lang.opt_camerazooms_desc: Enables the camera to zoom in on a beat hit. Uncheck to disable.
lang.opt_scoretextzoom_desc: Enables the Score text zooming everytime you hit a note.
lang.opt_afterimages_desc: Characters will leave afterimages on double notes. Uncheck to disable.
lang.opt_splashscreen_desc: If unchecked, it will completely skip the splash screen upon the engine's boot up.
lang.opt_devmode_desc: If checked, traces & developer hotkeys will become available.
lang.opt_streamedsongfiles_desc: Playable song files will be streamed via bytes instead of being loaded all at once. This heavily improves loading times, however it is EXTREMELY EXPERIMENTAL and prone to issues.
lang.opt_autopause_desc: The game will automatically freeze when unselected, pausing all sounds and visuals. If unchecked, the game will continue as normal regardless of focus.
lang.opt_quants_desc: Colors notes in-game based on their step value. Helpful for timing your note hits.
lang.opt_notesplashes_desc: Hitting "Sick!" or "Sussy!" notes show note-splash particles.
lang.opt_language_desc: Choose your language! Note: All languages besides English (United States) are community translated!
lang.opt_subtitles_desc: Subtitles will be shown on screen during cutscenes and song animations.
lang.opt_unlockedFramerate_desc: Unlocks the game's framerate. Uses more CPU power but might help with input latency.
lang.opt_vsyncMode_desc: Syncs the game's framerate to your monitor's refresh rate to prevent screen tearing.
lang.opt_backgroundStrumlines_desc: If enabled, additional characters' strumlines will be shown on screen whenever applicable.
lang.opt_discord_desc: If enabled, the game will show up in your Discord Activity Status while playing.
lang.weirdroute1: This room's been givin' the crew the creeps... Computer turnin' on and off on its own...
lang.weirdroute2: Well, it's not like anyone else is gonna do it, right? Let's check it out.
lang.weirdroute3: Damn, I can't really blame 'em for bein' scared. The lighting ain't particularly invitin'...
lang.weirdroute4: Time to do what I do best.
lang.weirdroute5: Red. I always knew somethin' was fishy about that guy, but I didn't stop him in time... He's rottin' in that lava pit now.
